metadata.description: Adspirer performance marketing plugins for Claude Code and Cowork. Manage ad campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, Amazon, and ChatGPT Ads.

plugins.name: adspirer-advertising-agent
plugins.description: Advertising agent for paid media: ad campaign management for Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Amazon Ads, and ChatGPT Ads. PPC keyword research, campaign creation, performance analysis, creative fatigue detection, and budget optimization.
